summary: Transforms operational data into actionable insights using analytics, visualization, and process mining to support continuous improvement.
responsibilities: Collect, clean, and prepare operational, quality, and workflow data for analysis
Develop dashboards and visualizations to support decision-making across all CI‑OS roles
Perform statistical analysis to identify trends, anomalies, and improvement opportunities
Conduct process mining to map actual process flows and detect bottlenecks or deviations
Collaborate with Process Engineers to validate hypotheses and quantify improvement impact
Support Quality Managers with evidence for audits, investigations, and compliance reporting
Maintain data dictionaries, metadata standards, and controlled vocabularies
Ensure data integrity, accuracy, and completeness across all CI‑OS systems
Automate recurring analyses and reporting pipelines
Provide data-driven insights during PDCA cycles and improvement workshops
authorities: Define analytical methods and visualization standards
Access operational and quality datasets as permitted by governance
decisionRights: Selection of analytical tools and models
kaizenCapabilities: Support for waste identification through data insights
Trend analysis for frontline and supervisor decision-making

constraints: Must comply with data governance and access control policies
Analytical outputs must be reproducible and documented
Predictive models must be validated before operational use
